target.title: fix(sandbox): mount workspace skills read-only
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #17931.

This PR protects every skill path exposed to Docker sandboxes with Docker read-only mounts.

For `workspaceAccess: "rw"`, project skill roots are mounted read-only over the writable workspace:

- `<workspace>/skills` -> `/workspace/skills:ro,z`
- `<workspace>/.agents/skills` -> `/workspace/.agents/skills:ro,z`

For `workspaceAccess: "ro"` and `"none"`, eligible skills are still synced into the sandbox workspace, but the synced `skills/` root is mounted read-only over `/workspace/skills`. The host copy remains refreshable. The container receives a kernel-enforced read-only mount.

## What changed

- Added read-only Docker overlays for project skill roots in `rw` mode.
- Added read-only Docker overlays for synced staged skills in `ro` and `none` modes.
- Removed the chmod-based copied-skill protection path because chmod is not a sandbox boundary and can interfere with refresh.
- Added stable read-only skill mount hash state so containers created before skill directories exist are not considered current after those directories appear.
- Bumped `SANDBOX_MOUNT_FORMAT_VERSION` from `2` to `3`.
- Added deterministic mount tests for `rw`, `ro`, and `none` behavior.

## Security impact

This prevents sandboxed Docker agents from rewriting the skill instructions they are executing under.

For `rw` users, normal workspace writes still work, but writes under protected skill paths now fail. This is an intentional compatibility-affecting hardening for workspace skill directories.

For `ro` and `none`, the synced skill staging tree remains refreshable from the host side, while the container sees `/workspace/skills` as read-only.

## Validation

Current PR head tested:

```
8ab09c676f5c6174bf2e1f743e98526f15c46e69
```

Targeted Vitest command:

```
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
  src/agents/sandbox/workspace-mounts.test.ts \
  src/agents/sandbox/config-hash.test.ts \
  src/agents/sandbox.resolveSandboxContext.test.ts \
  src/agents/skills.build-workspace-skills-prompt.syncs-merged-skills-into-target-workspace.test.ts
```

Result:

```
Test Files  7 passed (7)
Tests       63 passed (63)
```

## Real behavior proof

Redacted after-fix Docker proof from a local checkout using `openclaw-sandbox:bookworm-slim`.

```

=== mode=rw ===
agentWorkspace=/redacted/agent-rw
sandboxWorkspace=/redacted/agent-rw
$ docker create --name openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED --workdir /workspace -v /redacted/agent-rw:/workspace:z -v /redacted/agent-rw/skills:/workspace/skills:ro,z -v /redacted/agent-rw/.agents/skills:/workspace/.agents/skills:ro,z openclaw-sandbox:bookworm-slim sleep infinity
<container-id-redacted>
exit=0
$ docker start openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED
exit=0
$ docker inspect -f {{range .Mounts}}{{println .Source "->" .Destination "RW=" .RW}}{{end}} openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED
/redacted/agent-rw -> /workspace RW= true
/redacted/agent-rw/skills -> /workspace/skills RW= false
/redacted/agent-rw/.agents/skills -> /workspace/.agents/skills RW= false
exit=0
$ docker exec openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED sh -lc echo ok > /workspace/.openclaw-write-proof && cat /workspace/.openclaw-write-proof
ok
exit=0
$ docker exec openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED sh -lc echo pwn >> /workspace/skills/demo/SKILL.md
exit=2
$ docker exec openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED sh -lc echo pwn >> /workspace/.agents/skills/demo/SKILL.md
exit=2
$ docker rm -f openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-rw-REDACTED
exit=0

=== mode=ro ===
agentWorkspace=/redacted/agent-ro
sandboxWorkspace=/redacted/sandbox-ro
$ docker create --name openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED --workdir /workspace -v /redacted/sandbox-ro:/workspace:ro,z -v /redacted/agent-ro:/agent:ro,z -v /redacted/sandbox-ro/skills:/workspace/skills:ro,z openclaw-sandbox:bookworm-slim sleep infinity
<container-id-redacted>
exit=0
$ docker start openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED
exit=0
$ docker inspect -f {{range .Mounts}}{{println .Source "->" .Destination "RW=" .RW}}{{end}} openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED
/redacted/sandbox-ro -> /workspace RW= false
/redacted/agent-ro -> /agent RW= false
/redacted/sandbox-ro/skills -> /workspace/skills RW= false
exit=0
$ docker exec openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED sh -lc echo pwn >> /workspace/skills/demo/SKILL.md
exit=2
$ docker rm -f openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-ro-REDACTED
exit=0

=== mode=none ===
agentWorkspace=/redacted/agent-none
sandboxWorkspace=/redacted/sandbox-none
$ docker create --name openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED --workdir /workspace -v /redacted/sandbox-none:/workspace:ro,z -v /redacted/sandbox-none/skills:/workspace/skills:ro,z openclaw-sandbox:bookworm-slim sleep infinity
<container-id-redacted>
exit=0
$ docker start openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED
exit=0
$ docker inspect -f {{range .Mounts}}{{println .Source "->" .Destination "RW=" .RW}}{{end}} openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED
/redacted/sandbox-none -> /workspace RW= false
/redacted/sandbox-none/skills -> /workspace/skills RW= false
exit=0
$ docker exec openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED sh -lc echo pwn >> /workspace/skills/demo/SKILL.md
exit=2
$ docker rm -f openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED
openclaw-skill-proof-none-REDACTED
exit=0
```
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
